# Voice Typer — Generated Assets

This directory is **owned by automation**. Files here are synced from the
source repository
[`mariuszRep/whisper-vibes`](https://github.com/mariuszRep/whisper-vibes)
via a GitHub Action pull request.

**Do not edit files in this directory manually.** Changes should be made in
the source repository under `assets/` and will propagate here through the
automated sync workflow.

## Sync mechanism

1. Assets change in `whisper-vibes` under `assets/**`.
2. The `sync-assets` GitHub Action triggers.
3. A pull request is opened against this repository updating
   `voice-typer/assets/generated/`.
4. A human reviews and merges the pull request.

## Manual files

If you need to maintain assets that are **not** generated by automation,
place them in `voice-typer/assets/` outside of `generated/` (for example
`voice-typer/assets/manual/`).
